seo.title: Restaurant Ordering App — Your Own App from €149 | Gastro Master
seo.description: Your own restaurant ordering app: iOS & Android, custom branding, 0% commission, push notifications. From €149/month. Get a free consultation now.

hero.subtitle: Over 800 restaurant owners already take orders through their own app – including iOS & Android app,

video.title: See your app in action.
video.text: Over 800 restaurant owners in Germany already use their own ordering app – with their own logo, branding, and 0% commission. See for yourself how easy and convincing your own ordering app is for your guests.

features.title: What your Gastro Master ordering app can do.
features.text: Your app – with your name, your branding, and the features restaurants really need in daily operations. Especially ideal for businesses looking to
features.geoStat: According to Statista, over 36 million people in Germany used at least one food delivery app in 2024 — the direct channel is winning. (Source: Statista, Online Food Delivery Market Germany 2024)

cards.title: Push Notifications
cards.text: Remind your customers about offers, new dishes, and promotions – directly on their smartphone. Free, in real time.

cards.title: 100% Your Branding
cards.text: Your logo, your colors, your name – the app looks like your brand. No third-party logo, no external branding. Your customers only see you.
cards.imgAlt: Gastro Master App – Custom Branding, Logo and Colors

cards.title: Delivery & Pickup
cards.text: Customers choose themselves. Delivery zones, minimum order values, and opening hours – you set them up easily.
cards.imgAlt: Gastro Master App – Choose Delivery or Pickup

cards.title: Multiple Locations
cards.text: All branches in one app. Customers choose their location – you manage everything centrally.
cards.imgAlt: Gastro Master App – Multiple Locations / Branches

cards.title: Dynamic Menu
cards.text: Change prices, dishes, and availability in real time – no developer, no ticket, no waiting.

cards.title: Customer Login & Loyalty
cards.text: Order history, collect points, redeem rewards – directly in the app. Regular customers come back more often.
cards.imgAlt: Gastro Master App – Customer Login & Registration

cards.title: Online Payment & Checkout
cards.text: Apple Pay, Google Pay, credit card, and PayPal – all common payment methods directly in the app. Secure, fast, no detours.
cards.imgAlt: Gastro Master App – Online Payment & Checkout

cards.title: Your App in the App Store
cards.text: Your app appears under your name in the Apple App Store and Google Play Store – fully custom branding, 0% Gastro Master visible to your customers.
cards.imgAlt: Gastro Master App – Own App in Apple App Store and Google Play Store

demo.title: Experience the app yourself – just download it.
demo.text: Our demo app is available in the Apple App Store and Google Play Store. Download it and experience the ordering experience of your future customers – directly on your smartphone.

social.title: Your social media channels directly in your app.
social.text: Connect Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok with your own ordering app – and stay in touch with your guests, even after the order. More reach, more regulars, more revenue: those who follow you will order again. A strong social media presence measurably increases reorder rates and strengthens your brand long-term.

comparison.title: All advantages at a glance.
comparison.text: Those who sell through Lieferando, Wolt, or Uber Eats pay up to 30% commission – every month, automatically, without negotiation. With Gastro Master, you keep 100% of your revenue.
othersItems: Long contract commitments – often 12 to 24 months
14–30% profit loss through commissions per order
Completely dependent on platform rules and pricing
Hard to reach – no personal contact person
gmItems: Monthly cancellation possible – no minimum contract
0% commission on all orders – you keep your revenue
100% independent – full control over your system and prices
Support directly in Germany – fast and personal
Personal help via phone and WhatsApp

pricing.title: Everything included. No hidden costs.
pricing.text: One fixed monthly fee – no commission, no minimum contract, no dependency.
pricing.websiteText: Your digital storefront – a standalone restaurant website with image gallery, contact form, and Google Maps. Unlike the online shop, the website informs about your restaurant, while the shop takes orders directly.
pricing.txText: The payment provider's transaction fees are not paid by you as the operator – but by your customer. The fee is transparently shown at checkout. You receive your full revenue, without hidden costs.
pricing.flyerText: Flyers are the most effective way to get customers to scan your QR code. Professionally double-sided printed DIN A6 flyers with your branding – ideal as a delivery insert, for the takeaway area at the counter, or for distribution. The first 2,500 flyers are free with every subscription, including a free PDF template. When you reorder as your supply runs low:

steps.title: Your own restaurant app in 3 steps.
steps.text: You don't need to be a developer. We handle everything – you set the direction.

items.title: Consultation & Configuration
items.text: We discuss together how your app should look: name, logo, colors, menu, delivery areas, payment methods. No technical knowledge required.

items.title: We set everything up
items.text: Our team configures your app, sets up the online shop, and ensures everything runs smoothly. You don't need to code or upload anything yourself.

items.title: Live in the App Store & first orders
items.text: After 2–3 weeks, your app is live in the Apple App Store and Google Play Store. From now on, you take orders directly – 0% commission, 100% your revenue.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions about the Gastro Master ordering app.
faq.text: More questions? Call us or write to us – we respond within 24 hours.

items.q: How long does it take to set up my own ordering app?
items.a: Typically, it takes 2–3 weeks until your app is live in the Apple App Store and Google Play Store. During this time, we configure the design, menu, delivery areas, and payment methods together with you. You don't need to code anything yourself — anyone who then wants to [start their own delivery service](/solutions/start-delivery-service) can get started right away.

items.q: What does a restaurant app cost?
items.a: The Gastro Master App including [online shop](/products/webshop) costs from €149 per month (net). This includes app hosting, App Store management, ongoing updates, and support. There is no commission per order – just the fixed monthly fee. The online shop without an app is available from €79/month. You can find all packages and prices on the [pricing page](/pricing).

items.q: Does the app appear under my own name in the App Store?
items.a: Yes, absolutely. Your app is published under your business name, with your logo and your colors in the Apple App Store and Google Play Store. No Gastro Master branding is visible to your customers.

items.q: Can I use the app for multiple locations?
items.a: Yes. The Gastro Master App is suitable for single locations and [franchise concepts](/solutions/franchise) with multiple branches. Customers select their location directly in the app and order there. The platform supports up to 100 locations – many of our customers already operate 10 or more branches through a single custom-branded app.

items.q: Are there push notifications and a loyalty program?
items.a: Yes. You can send push notifications to your customers at any time – for offers, new dishes, or promotions. Additionally, the app offers a loyalty points system: customers collect points with every order and redeem them for rewards. You can find all included features in the [pricing overview](/pricing).

items.q: Can I try the app before purchasing?
items.a: Yes. You can download our demo app directly and experience the user experience yourself – in the Apple App Store or Google Play Store (search: "Gastro Master App").

items.q: Do I need technical know-how to run the app?
items.a: No. The app is fully set up and maintained by us. You manage your menu, prices, and offers through a simple backend – no coding required. For questions, our [support team](/contact) is directly available.

teamCta.title: Book your
teamCta.expectText: In a free initial consultation, one of our app experts develops an individual concept for your own ordering app – with your branding, your menu, and 0% commission. Non-binding and completely free.
teamCta.expectSubtext: Your app can be live in the Apple App Store and Google Play Store in just 2–3 weeks. No coding skills needed – we handle everything.
